title: Frigid
description: Snow has taken over the globe, and now only you remain.
body:
# ![early logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89fbfe07c2cc67743afe884c72875ce2cf00c3d1.png)
## Explore the remains of society after a climate collapse. 
Thanks to the carlessness of the world powers, climate change never stopped. Now all of the world is either a desert, flooded, or in a eternal winter. Evreyone is gone. Only you remain. 
## THIS MODPACK IS IN EARLY ALPHA! 
**This modpack is nowhere near the state i want it to be, and i plan to continue to work on it :)**
